text.message: U said blue gg and trading 1:1 grain for blue
get a city on your wheat
i see brick port in your future
Else blue gets road and win
I can't decide who wins now
i guess i have to kamikaze
orange u strategically squeezed me with your placements
sorry you chose to do this
Idk why you guys were never worried about orange
imagine if you didnt build that top road
I have to get 3 back no ?
I could have let it go
we're far from done with blue
i'm not exactly building these roads for my own health
So concered about me for some reason
